description: Case diameter: 40 mmCase thickness: 10 mmDial shape: RoundSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortBlack leather strap with silver laser cut design and a tang clasp for comfort and styleBlack and green dial with brand logo at the 12 hour mark and branding at the 9 hour markQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it during slight rains
